verses.latin_vulgate: Diligam te, Domine, fortitudo mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמַ֡ר אֶרְחׇמְךָ֖ יְהֹוָ֣ה חִזְקִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will love thee, O Lord, my strength:
verses.finnish_biblia: Edelläveisaajalle, Davidin Herran palvelian Psalmi, joka Herralle nämät veisun sanat puhui sinä päivänä, jona Herra hänen vapahti kaikkein vihollistensa käsistä ja Saulin käsistä. (H18:2) Ja hän sanoi: minä rakastan sydämestäni sinua, Herra, minun voimani.
verses.king_james: I will love thee, O Lord, my strength.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus firmamentum meum, et refugium meum, et liberator meus.  Deus meus adjutor meus, et sperabo in eum ;  protector meus, et cornu salutis meæ, et susceptor meus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֤ה ׀ סַ֥לְעִ֥י וּמְצוּדָתִ֗י וּמְפַ֫לְטִ֥י אֵלִ֣י צ֭וּרִי אֶֽחֱסֶה־בּ֑וֹ מָֽגִנִּ֥י וְקֶֽרֶן־יִ֝שְׁעִ֗י מִשְׂגַּבִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord is my firmament, my refuge, and my deliverer. My God is my helper, and in him will I put my trust. My protector, and the horn of my salvation, and my support.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, minun kallioni, minun linnani ja minun vapahtajani; minun Jumalani on minun vahani, johon minä turvaan: minun kilpeni, ja minun autuuteni sarvi, ja minun varjelukseni.
verses.king_james: The Lord is my rock, and my fortress, and my deliverer; my God, my strength, in whom I will trust; my buckler, and the horn of my salvation, and my high tower.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudans invocabo Dominum,  et ab inimicis meis salvus ero.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְ֭הֻלָּל אֶקְרָ֣א יְהֹוָ֑ה וּמִן־אֹ֝יְבַ֗י אִוָּשֵֽׁעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Praising, I will call upon the Lord: and I shall be saved from my enemies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä kiitän ja avukseni huudan Herraa, niin minä vapahdetaan vihollisistani.
verses.king_james: I will call upon the Lord, who is worthy to be praised: so shall I be saved from mine enemies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Circumdederunt me dolores mortis,  et torrentes iniquitatis conturbaverunt me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲפָפ֥וּנִי חֶבְלֵי־מָ֑וֶת וְֽנַחֲלֵ֖י בְלִיַּ֣עַל יְבַֽעֲתֽוּנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sorrows of death surrounded me: and the torrents of iniquity troubled me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä kuoleman siteet olivat käärineet minun ympäri, ja Belialin ojat peljättivät minun.
verses.king_james: The sorrows of death compassed me, and the floods of ungodly men made me afraid.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dolores inferni circumdederunt me ;  præoccupaverunt me laquei mortis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֶבְלֵ֣י שְׁא֣וֹל סְבָב֑וּנִי קִ֝דְּמ֗וּנִי מ֣וֹקְשֵׁי מָֽוֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: The sorrows of hell encompassed me: and the snares of death prevented me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Helvetin siteet kietoivat minun: kuoleman paulat ennättivät minun.
verses.king_james: The sorrows of hell compassed me about: the snares of death prevented me.

verses.latin_vulgate: In tribulatione mea invocavi Dominum,  et ad Deum meum clamavi :  et exaudivit de templo sancto suo vocem meam ;  et clamor meus in conspectu ejus introivit in aures ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּצַּר־לִ֤י ׀ אֶ֥קְרָ֣א יְהֹוָה֮ וְאֶל־אֱלֹהַ֢י אֲשַׁ֫וֵּ֥עַ יִשְׁמַ֣ע מֵהֵיכָל֣וֹ קוֹלִ֑י וְ֝שַׁוְעָתִ֗י לְפָנָ֤יו ׀ תָּב֬וֹא בְאׇזְנָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: In my affliction I called upon the Lord, and I cried to my God: And he heard my voice from his holy temple: and my cry before him came into his ears.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ahdistuksessani minä avukseni huudan Herraa, ja minun Jumalani tykö minä huudan: niin hän kuulee ääneni templistänsä, ja minun huutoni hänen edessänsä tulee hänen korviinsa.
verses.king_james: In my distress I called upon the Lord, and cried unto my God: he heard my voice out of his temple, and my cry came before him, even into his ears.

verses.latin_vulgate: Commota est, et contremuit terra ;  fundamenta montium conturbata sunt, et commota sunt :  quoniam iratus est eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּגְעַ֬שׁ וַתִּרְעַ֨שׁ ׀ הָאָ֗רֶץ וּמוֹסְדֵ֣י הָרִ֣ים יִרְגָּ֑זוּ וַ֝יִּתְגָּֽעֲשׁ֗וּ כִּי־חָ֥רָה לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The earth shook and trembled: the foundations of the mountains were troubled and were moved, because he was angry with them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Maa liikkui ja vapisi, ja vuorten perustukset liikkuivat: he värisivät, koska hän vihastui.
verses.king_james: Then the earth shook and trembled; the foundations also of the hills moved and were shaken, because he was wroth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ascendit fumus in ira ejus,  et ignis a facie ejus exarsit ;  carbones succensi sunt ab eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָ֘לָ֤ה עָשָׁ֨ן ׀ בְּאַפּ֗וֹ וְאֵשׁ־מִפִּ֥יו תֹּאכֵ֑ל גֶּ֝חָלִ֗ים בָּעֲר֥וּ מִמֶּֽנּוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: There went up a smoke in his wrath: and a fire flamed from his face: coals were kindled by it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Savu suitsi hänen sieraimistansa ja kuluttava tuli hänen suustansa, niin että hiilet siitä syttyivät.
verses.king_james: There went up a smoke out of his nostrils, and fire out of his mouth devoured: coals were kindled by it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inclinavit cælos, et descendit,  et caligo sub pedibus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֣ט שָׁ֭מַיִם וַיֵּרַ֑ד וַ֝עֲרָפֶ֗ל תַּ֣חַת רַגְלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: He bowed the heavens, and came down, and darkness was under his feet.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän notkisti taivaat ja astui alas, ja synkiä pimeys oli hänen jalkainsa alla.
verses.king_james: He bowed the heavens also, and came down: and darkness was under his feet.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ascendit super cherubim, et volavit ;  volavit super pennas ventorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּרְכַּ֣ב עַל־כְּ֭רוּב וַיָּעֹ֑ף וַ֝יֵּ֗דֶא עַל־כַּנְפֵי־רֽוּחַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he ascended upon the cherubim, and he flew; he flew upon the wings of the winds.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän astui Kerubimin päälle ja lensi, ja hän lensi tuulen sulkain päällä.
verses.king_james: And he rode upon a cherub, and did fly: yea, he did fly upon the wings of the wind.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et posuit tenebras latibulum suum ;  in circuitu ejus tabernaculum ejus,  tenebrosa aqua in nubibus aëris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָ֤שֶׁת־חֹ֨שֶׁךְ ׀ סִתְר֗וֹ סְבִֽיבוֹתָ֥יו סֻכָּת֑וֹ חֶשְׁכַת־מַ֝֗יִם עָבֵ֥י שְׁחָקִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he made darkness his cover, his pavilion round about him: dark waters in the clouds of the air.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän pani pimeyden majansa ympärille, ja mustat paksut pilvet, jossa hän lymyssä oli.
verses.king_james: He made darkness his secret place; his pavilion round about him were dark waters and thick clouds of the skies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Præ fulgore in conspectu ejus nubes transierunt ;  grando et carbones ignis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִנֹּ֗גַהּ נֶ֫גְדּ֥וֹ עָבָ֥יו עָבְר֑וּ בָּ֝רָ֗ד וְגַֽחֲלֵי־אֵֽשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: At the brightness that was before him the clouds passed, hail and coals of fire.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kirkkaudesta hänen edessänsä hajosivat pilvet rakeilla ja leimauksilla.
verses.king_james: At the brightness that was before him his thick clouds passed, hail stones and coals of fire.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et intonuit de cælo Dominus,  et Altissimus dedit vocem suam :  grando et carbones ignis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּרְעֵ֬ם בַּשָּׁמַ֨יִם ׀ יְֽהֹוָ֗ה וְ֭עֶלְיוֹן יִתֵּ֣ן קֹל֑וֹ בָּ֝רָ֗ד וְגַֽחֲלֵי־אֵֽשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord thundered from heaven, and the Highest gave his voice: hail and coals of fire.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra jylisti taivaissa, Ylimmäinen antoi pauhinansa, rakeilla ja leimauksilla.
verses.king_james: The Lord also thundered in the heavens, and the Highest gave his voice; hail stones and coals of fire.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et misit sagittas suas, et dissipavit eos ;  fulgura multiplicavit, et conturbavit eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַ֣ח חִ֭צָּיו וַיְפִיצֵ֑ם וּבְרָקִ֥ים רָ֝֗ב וַיְהֻמֵּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he sent forth his arrows, and he scattered them: he multiplied lightnings, and troubled them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän ampui nuolensa ja hajoitti heitä: hän iski kovat leimaukset, ja peljätti heitä,
verses.king_james: Yea, he sent out his arrows, and scattered them; and he shot out lightnings, and discomfited them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et apparuerunt fontes aquarum,  et revelata sunt fundamenta orbis terrarum,  ab increpatione tua, Domine,  ab inspiratione spiritus iræ tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֤רָא֨וּ ׀ אֲפִ֥יקֵי מַ֗יִם וַֽיִּגָּלוּ֮ מוֹסְד֢וֹת תֵּ֫בֵ֥ל מִגַּעֲרָ֣תְךָ֣ יְהֹוָ֑ה מִ֝נִּשְׁמַ֗ת ר֣וּחַ אַפֶּֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then the fountains of waters appeared, and the foundations of the world were discovered: At thy rebuke, O Lord, at the blast of the spirit of thy wrath.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja niin ilmestyivät vetten kuljut, ja maan perustukset ilmaantuivat, Herra, sinun kovasta nuhtelemisestas ja sinun sieraimies hengen puhalluksesta.
verses.king_james: Then the channels of waters were seen, and the foundations of the world were discovered at thy rebuke, O Lord, at the blast of the breath of thy nostrils.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misit de summo, et accepit me ;  et assumpsit me de aquis multis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִשְׁלַ֣ח מִ֭מָּרוֹם יִקָּחֵ֑נִי יַֽ֝מְשֵׁ֗נִי מִמַּ֥יִם רַבִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: He sent from on high, and took me: and received me out of many waters.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän lähetti korkeudesta ja otti minun, ja veti minun ulos suurista vesistä.
verses.king_james: He sent from above, he took me, he drew me out of many waters.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eripuit me de inimicis meis fortissimis, et ab his qui oderunt me.  Quoniam confortati sunt super me ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַצִּילֵ֗נִי מֵאֹיְבִ֥י עָ֑ז וּ֝מִשֹּׂנְאַ֗י כִּֽי־אָמְצ֥וּ מִמֶּֽנִּי׃
verses.douay_rheims: He delivered me from my strongest enemies, and from them that hated me: for they were too strong for me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän vapahti minun voimallisista vihollisistani, jotka minua väkevämmät olivat.
verses.king_james: He delivered me from my strong enemy, and from them which hated me: for they were too strong for me.

verses.latin_vulgate: prævenerunt me in die afflictionis meæ :  et factus est Dominus protector meus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְקַדְּמ֥וּנִי בְיוֹם־אֵידִ֑י וַֽיְהִי־יְהֹוָ֖ה לְמִשְׁעָ֣ן לִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: They prevented me in the day of my affliction: and the Lord became my protector.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ne ennättivät minun tuskapäivänäni; mutta Herra tuli minun turvakseni.
verses.king_james: They prevented me in the day of my calamity: but the Lord was my stay.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et eduxit me in latitudinem ;  salvum me fecit, quoniam voluit me,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיּוֹצִיאֵ֥נִי לַמֶּרְחָ֑ב יְ֝חַלְּצֵ֗נִי כִּ֘י־חָ֥פֵֽץ־בִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he brought me forth into a large place: he saved me, because he was well pleased with me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän vei minun lakialle: hän tempasi minun ulos; sillä hän mielistyi minuun.
verses.king_james: He brought me forth also into a large place; he delivered me, because he delighted in me.

verses.latin_vulgate: et retribuet mihi Dominus secundum justitiam meam,  et secundum puritatem manuum mearum retribuet mihi :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִגְמְלֵ֣נִי יְהֹוָ֣ה כְּצִדְקִ֑י כְּבֹ֥ר יָ֝דַ֗י יָשִׁ֥יב לִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord will reward me according to my justice; and will repay me according to the cleanness of my hands:
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra maksoi minulle minun vanhurskauteni jälkeen: hän antoi minulle kätteni puhtauden jälkeen.
verses.king_james: The Lord rewarded me according to my righteousness; according to the cleanness of my hands hath he recompensed me.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia custodivi vias Domini,  nec impie gessi a Deo meo ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־שָׁ֭מַרְתִּי דַּרְכֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וְלֹֽא־רָ֝שַׁ֗עְתִּי מֵאֱלֹהָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because I have kept the ways of the Lord; and have not done wickedly against my God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minä pidän Herran tiet, ja en ole Jumalaani vastaan.
verses.king_james: For I have kept the ways of the Lord, and have not wickedly departed from my God.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam omnia judicia ejus in conspectu meo,  et justitias ejus non repuli a me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י כׇל־מִשְׁפָּטָ֣יו לְנֶגְדִּ֑י וְ֝חֻקֹּתָ֗יו לֹא־אָסִ֥יר מֶֽנִּי׃
verses.douay_rheims: For all his judgments are in my sight: and his justices I have not put away from me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä kaikki hänen oikeutensa ovat silmäini edessä, ja hänen käskyjänsä en minä tyköäni hylkää.
verses.king_james: For all his judgments were before me, and I did not put away his statutes from me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ero immaculatus cum eo ;  et observabo me ab iniquitate mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֱהִ֣י תָמִ֣ים עִמּ֑וֹ וָ֝אֶשְׁתַּמֵּ֗ר מֵעֲוֺנִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I shall be spotless with him: and shall keep myself from my iniquity.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan olen vakaa hänen edessänsä ja vältän vääryyttä.
verses.king_james: I was also upright before him, and I kept myself from mine iniquity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et retribuet mihi Dominus secundum justitiam meam,  et secundum puritatem manuum mearum in conspectu oculorum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּֽשֶׁב־יְהֹוָ֣ה לִ֣י כְצִדְקִ֑י כְּבֹ֥ר יָ֝דַ֗י לְנֶ֣גֶד עֵינָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord will reward me according to my justice: and according to the cleanness of my hands before his eyes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden Herra kostaa minulle vanhurskauteni perästä, kätteni puhtauden jälkeen, silmäinsä edessä.
verses.king_james: Therefore hath the Lord recompensed me according to my righteousness, according to the cleanness of my hands in his eyesight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum sancto sanctus eris,  et cum viro innocente innocens eris,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עִם־חָסִ֥יד תִּתְחַסָּ֑ד עִם־גְּבַ֥ר תָּ֝מִ֗ים תִּתַּמָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: With the holy thou wilt be holy; and with the innocent man thou wilt be innocent:
verses.finnish_biblia: Pyhäin kanssa sinä pyhä olet, ja toimellisten kanssa toimellinen.
verses.king_james: With the merciful thou wilt shew thyself merciful; with an upright man thou wilt shew thyself upright;

verses.latin_vulgate: et cum electo electus eris,  et cum perverso perverteris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עִם־נָבָ֥ר תִּתְבָּרָ֑ר וְעִם־עִ֝קֵּ֗שׁ תִּתְפַּתָּֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And with the elect thou wilt be elect: and with the perverse thou wilt be perverted.
verses.finnish_biblia: Puhdasten kanssa sinä puhdas olet, ja nurjain kanssa sinä nurja olet.
verses.king_james: With the pure thou wilt shew thyself pure; and with the froward thou wilt shew thyself froward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam tu populum humilem salvum facies,  et oculos superborum humiliabis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־אַ֭תָּה עַם־עָנִ֣י תוֹשִׁ֑יעַ וְעֵינַ֖יִם רָמ֣וֹת תַּשְׁפִּֽיל׃
verses.douay_rheims: For thou wilt save the humble people; but wilt bring down the eyes of the proud.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinä vapahdat ahdistetun kansan, ja korkiat silmät sinä alennat.
verses.king_james: For thou wilt save the afflicted people; but wilt bring down high looks.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam tu illuminas lucernam meam, Domine ;  Deus meus, illumina tenebras meas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־אַ֭תָּה תָּאִ֣יר נֵרִ֑י יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱ֝לֹהַ֗י יַגִּ֥יהַּ חׇשְׁכִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: For thou lightest my lamp, O Lord: O my God, enlighten my darkness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minun kynttiläni sinä valaiset; Herra minun Jumalani valaisee minun pimeyteni.
verses.king_james: For thou wilt light my candle: the Lord my God will enlighten my darkness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam in te eripiar a tentatione ;  et in Deo meo transgrediar murum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־בְ֭ךָ אָרֻ֣ץ גְּד֑וּד וּ֝בֵֽאלֹהַ֗י אֲדַלֶּג־שֽׁוּר׃
verses.douay_rheims: For by thee I shall be delivered from temptation; and through my God I shall go over a wall.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinun kauttas minä sotaväen murran, ja minun Jumalassani karkaan muurin ylitse.
verses.king_james: For by thee I have run through a troop; and by my God have I leaped over a wall.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus meus, impolluta via ejus ;  eloquia Domini igne examinata :  protector est omnium sperantium in se.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָאֵל֮ תָּמִ֢ים דַּ֫רְכּ֥וֹ אִמְרַֽת־יְהֹוָ֥ה צְרוּפָ֑ה מָגֵ֥ן ה֝֗וּא לְכֹ֤ל ׀ הַחֹסִ֬ים בּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: As for my God, his way is undefiled: the words of the Lord are fire-tried: he is the protector of all that trust in him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumalan tie on täydellinen. Herran puheet tulella koetellut: hän on kaikkein kilpi, jotka häneen uskaltavat.
verses.king_james: As for God, his way is perfect: the word of the Lord is tried: he is a buckler to all those that trust in him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam quis deus præter Dominum ?  aut quis deus præter Deum nostrum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י מִ֣י אֱ֭לוֹהַּ מִבַּלְעֲדֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וּמִ֥י צ֝֗וּר זוּלָתִ֥י אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For who is God but the Lord? or who is God but our God?
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä kuka on Jumala, paitsi Herraa? ja kuka on kallio, paitsi Jumalaamme?
verses.king_james: For who is God save the Lord? or who is a rock save our God?

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus qui præcinxit me virtute,  et posuit immaculatam viam meam ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָ֭אֵל הַמְאַזְּרֵ֣נִי חָ֑יִל וַיִּתֵּ֖ן תָּמִ֣ים דַּרְכִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: God, who hath girt me with strength; and made my way blameless.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumala vyöttää minun voimalla, ja panee minun tieni viattomaksi.
verses.king_james: It is God that girdeth me with strength, and maketh my way perfect.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui perfecit pedes meos tamquam cervorum,  et super excelsa statuens me ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְשַׁוֶּ֣ה רַ֭גְלַי כָּאַיָּל֑וֹת וְעַ֥ל בָּ֝מֹתַ֗י יַעֲמִידֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who hath made my feet like the feet of harts: and who setteth me upon high places.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän tekee jalkani niinkuin peurain jalat, ja asettaa minun korkeudelle.
verses.king_james: He maketh my feet like hinds’ feet, and setteth me upon my high places.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui docet manus meas ad prælium.  Et posuisti, ut arcum æreum, brachia mea,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְלַמֵּ֣ד יָ֭דַי לַמִּלְחָמָ֑ה וְֽנִחֲתָ֥ה קֶֽשֶׁת־נְ֝חוּשָׁ֗ה זְרוֹעֹתָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who teacheth my hands to war: and thou hast made my arms like a brazen bow.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän opettaa käteni sotimaan, ja käsivarteni vaskijoutsea vetämään.
verses.king_james: He teacheth my hands to war, so that a bow of steel is broken by mine arms.

verses.latin_vulgate: et dedisti mihi protectionem salutis tuæ :  et dextera tua suscepit me,  et disciplina tua correxit me in finem,  et disciplina tua ipsa me docebit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּתֶּן־לִי֮ מָגֵ֢ן יִ֫שְׁעֶ֥ךָ וִֽימִינְךָ֥ תִסְעָדֵ֑נִי וְֽעַנְוַתְךָ֥ תַרְבֵּֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou hast given me the protection of thy salvation: and thy right hand hath held me up: And thy discipline hath corrected me unto the end: and thy discipline, the same shall teach me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sinä annoit minulle autuutes kilven, ja sinun oikia kätes vahvistaa minun: ja koskas minun alennat, niin sinä teet minun suureksi.
verses.king_james: Thou hast also given me the shield of thy salvation: and thy right hand hath holden me up, and thy gentleness hath made me great.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dilatasti gressus meos subtus me,  et non sunt infirmata vestigia mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תַּרְחִ֣יב צַעֲדִ֣י תַחְתָּ֑י וְלֹ֥א מָ֝עֲד֗וּ קַרְסֻלָּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou hast enlarged my steps under me; and my feet are not weakened.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä levitit minun askeleeni minun allani, ettei minun kantapääni livistyneet.
verses.king_james: Thou hast enlarged my steps under me, that my feet did not slip.

verses.latin_vulgate: Persequar inimicos meos, et comprehendam illos ;  et non convertar donec deficiant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶרְדּ֣וֹף א֭וֹיְבַי וְאַשִּׂיגֵ֑ם וְלֹֽא־אָ֝שׁ֗וּב עַד־כַּלּוֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will pursue after my enemies, and overtake them: and I will not turn again till they are consumed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä ajan vihollisiani takaa ja käsitän heitä, ja en palaja, ennenkuin minä heidät hukutan.
verses.king_james: I have pursued mine enemies, and overtaken them: neither did I turn again till they were consumed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confringam illos, nec poterunt stare ;  cadent subtus pedes meos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶ֭מְחָצֵם וְלֹא־יֻ֣כְלוּ ק֑וּם יִ֝פְּל֗וּ תַּ֣חַת רַגְלָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will break them, and they shall not be able to stand: they shall fall under my feet.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä runtelen heitä, ettei he taida nousta: heidän täytyy kaatua jalkaini alla.
verses.king_james: I have wounded them that they were not able to rise: they are fallen under my feet.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et præcinxisti me virtute ad bellum,  et supplantasti insurgentes in me subtus me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתְּאַזְּרֵ֣נִי חַ֭יִל לַמִּלְחָמָ֑ה תַּכְרִ֖יעַ קָמַ֣י תַּחְתָּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou hast girded me with strength unto battle; and hast subdued under me them that rose up against me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä valmistat minun voimalla sotaan: sinä taivutat minun alleni ne, jotka nousevat minua vastaan.
verses.king_james: For thou hast girded me with strength unto the battle: thou hast subdued under me those that rose up against me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et inimicos meos dedisti mihi dorsum,  et odientes me disperdidisti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽאֹיְבַ֗י נָתַ֣תָּה לִּ֣י עֹ֑רֶף וּ֝מְשַׂנְאַ֗י אַצְמִיתֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou hast made my enemies turn their back upon me, and hast destroyed them that hated me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä annat minulle viholliseni kaulan, ja minä kadotan vainoojani.
verses.king_james: Thou hast also given me the necks of mine enemies; that I might destroy them that hate me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Clamaverunt, nec erat qui salvos faceret ;  ad Dominum, nec exaudivit eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְשַׁוְּע֥וּ וְאֵין־מוֹשִׁ֑יעַ עַל־יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה וְלֹ֣א עָנָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: They cried, but there was none to save them, to the Lord: but he heard them not.
verses.finnish_biblia: He huutavat, vaan ei ole auttajaa: Herran tykö, mutta ei hän vastaa heitä.
verses.king_james: They cried, but there was none to save them: even unto the Lord, but he answered them not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et comminuam eos ut pulverem ante faciem venti ;  ut lutum platearum delebo eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְֽאֶשְׁחָקֵ֗ם כְּעָפָ֥ר עַל־פְּנֵי־ר֑וּחַ כְּטִ֖יט חוּצ֣וֹת אֲרִיקֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I shall beat them as small as the dust before the wind; I shall bring them to nought, like the dirt in the streets.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä survon heitä niinkuin maan tomun tuulen edessä, ja heitän pois niinkuin loan kaduilta.
verses.king_james: Then did I beat them small as the dust before the wind: I did cast them out as the dirt in the streets.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eripies me de contradictionibus populi ;  constitues me in caput gentium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּפַלְּטֵנִי֮ מֵרִ֢יבֵ֫י עָ֥ם תְּ֭שִׂימֵנִי לְרֹ֣אשׁ גּוֹיִ֑ם עַ֖ם לֹא־יָדַ֣עְתִּי יַֽעַבְדֽוּנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou wilt deliver me from the contradictions of the people; thou wilt make me head of the Gentiles.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä pelastat minua riitaisesta kansasta: sinä asetat minun pakanain pääksi; se kansa, jota en minä tuntenut, palvelee minua.
verses.king_james: Thou hast delivered me from the strivings of the people; and thou hast made me the head of the heathen: a people whom I have not known shall serve me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Populus quem non cognovi servivit mihi ;  in auditu auris obedivit mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְשֵׁ֣מַֽע אֹ֭זֶן יִשָּׁ֣מְעוּ לִ֑י בְּנֵֽי־נֵ֝כָ֗ר יְכַחֲשׁוּ־לִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: A people which I knew not, hath served me: at the hearing of the ear they have obeyed me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Se kuultelee minua kuuliaisilla korvilla: muukalaiset lapset kieltävät minun.
verses.king_james: As soon as they hear of me, they shall obey me: the strangers shall submit themselves unto me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii alieni mentiti sunt mihi,  filii alieni inveterati sunt,  et claudicaverunt a semitis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי־נֵכָ֥ר יִבֹּ֑לוּ וְ֝יַחְרְג֗וּ מִֽמִּסְגְּרֽוֹתֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The children that are strangers have lied to me, strange children have faded away, and have halted from their paths.
verses.finnish_biblia: Muukalaiset lapset vaipuvat ja vapisevat siteissänsä.
verses.king_james: The strangers shall fade away, and be afraid out of their close places.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vivit Dominus, et benedictus Deus meus,  et exaltetur Deus salutis meæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חַי־יְ֭הֹוָה וּבָר֣וּךְ צוּרִ֑י וְ֝יָר֗וּם אֱלוֹהֵ֥י יִשְׁעִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord liveth, and blessed be my God, and let the God of my salvation be exalted.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra elää, ja kiitetty olkoon minun kallioni, ja minun autuuteni Jumala olkoon ylistetty!
verses.king_james: The Lord liveth; and blessed be my rock; and let the God of my salvation be exalted.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus qui das vindictas mihi,  et subdis populos sub me ;  liberator meus de inimicis meis iracundis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָאֵ֗ל הַנּוֹתֵ֣ן נְקָמ֣וֹת לִ֑י וַיַּדְבֵּ֖ר עַמִּ֣ים תַּחְתָּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: O God, who avengest me, and subduest the people under me, my deliverer from my enraged enemies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumala, joka minulle koston antaa, ja vaatii kansat minun alleni;
verses.king_james: It is God that avengeth me, and subdueth the people under me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ab insurgentibus in me exaltabis me ;  a viro iniquo eripies me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְפַלְּטִ֗י מֵאֹ֫יְבָ֥י אַ֣ף מִן־קָ֭מַי תְּרוֹמְמֵ֑נִי מֵאִ֥ישׁ חָ֝מָ֗ס תַּצִּילֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou wilt lift me up above them that rise up against me: from the unjust man thou wilt deliver me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka minua auttaa vihollisistani: sinä korotat myös minun niistä, jotka karkaavat minua vastaan: sinä pelastat minua väkivaltaisesta miehestä.
verses.king_james: He delivereth me from mine enemies: yea, thou liftest me up above those that rise up against me: thou hast delivered me from the violent man.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea confitebor tibi in nationibus, Domine,  et nomini tuo psalmum dicam ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּ֤ן ׀ אוֹדְךָ֖ בַגּוֹיִ֥ם ׀ יְהֹוָ֑ה וּלְשִׁמְךָ֥ אֲזַמֵּֽרָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore will I give glory to thee, O Lord, among the nations, and I will sing a psalm to thy name.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden minä kiitän sinua, Herra, pakanain seassa, ja veisaan nimelles kiitoksen,
verses.king_james: Therefore will I give thanks unto thee, O Lord, among the heathen, and sing praises unto thy name.

verses.latin_vulgate: magnificans salutes regis ejus,  et faciens misericordiam christo suo David,  et semini ejus usque in sæculum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַגְדִּל֮ יְשׁוּע֢וֹת מַ֫לְכּ֥וֹ וְעֹ֤שֶׂה חֶ֨סֶד ׀ לִמְשִׁיח֗וֹ לְדָוִ֥ד וּלְזַרְע֗וֹ עַד־עוֹלָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Giving great deliverance to his king, and shewing mercy to David, his anointed: and to his seed for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka suuren autuuden kuninkaallensa osoittaa, ja tekee hyvästi voidellullensa, Davidille, ja hänen siemenellensä ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: Great deliverance giveth he to his king; and sheweth mercy to his anointed, to David, and to his seed for evermore.
